understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the gem tile marked '+' in each level, avoiding spikes, within a limited number of turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Gravity pulls the player down until landing on a tile or spike. Clicking removes certain tiles, which can cause the player to fall. Movement and clicks consume turns. Spikes end the attempt. Each level has 2 attempts and 50 turns per attempt.
